name: Provence; Handle with care
description:
Ladies and gentlemen, another Arknights bot.

I asked somebody about what fluff bot to make, they responded with Provence. Why? "One word: T A I L"

For profile pic artist is uh... yueyue no hand

I mean, I think it is?

For the reddit one: https://www.reddit.com/r/touchfluffytail/comments/kyuhzz/she_requested_you_touch_it_arknights/#lightbox

Option 1 is for Operator pov, option 2 is for Doktah
